title: fs_watch.subscribe request
description: Subscribe to filesystem change events under a root. Returns a handle; matching events are emitted as AgentEvent fs_watch batches for the current or supplied session.

session_id.description: Optional explicit AgentEvent session id. Defaults to the current agent session.

root.description: Root directory used for relative glob and gitignore matching. If paths is omitted, this is also the watched path.

paths.description: Optional paths to watch. Relative paths are resolved against root.

globs.description: Optional globset patterns matched against paths relative to root.

kinds.description: Optional filter on event kinds (`create`, `modify`, `remove`, `rename`). Defaults to those four mutation kinds.
